sentences.sentence: The various sciences of fortune-telling such as astrology, palmistry, physiognomy and the like are the outcome of the above desire.
It also gives, in addition to a few particulars relating to Physiognomy, some informations usually found in the books on the science of palmistry.
It may be mentioned in this connection that palmistry originally formed part of physiognomy and as such some portions of palmistry are usually found in the works on Physiognomy.
Six places should be lefty or elevated (high): these are the forehead, shoulders, belly or paunch, arm-pits, chest and back of the palm.
If it appears as a double-head with a dent in the middle he will not have wealth and his fate will be bent on sinful actions.
If the palm is elevated without being sunk he will give away his wealth.
If it is hairy palm indicates that he well earn his livelihood committing sinful deeds and that he will also be stability.
One should not have too many lines on the palm and those visible should be this and red.

Among the lions on the right palm of there appears the mark of a comet (asteria) or disease (celebra) he will always be receiving money and also giving it away: the sign of a fish, he will have vast riches, but close flated.

It is also said that royal persons will have one or more of these signs on their palm, and if there is a line without any break from the middle of the wrist to the tip of the middle finger he will have great wisdom and will be a philosopher; and if it crops at the base of the middle finger he will be a scholar (and also the possessor of vast riches and land according to another authority).
If that line reaches the base of the little finger he will have wealth (and enjoy kinghip and ejoy the gathering of women according to another authority).
If it reaches the base of the ring finger he will wear ornaments; but will also be mental suffering.
If it reaches the base of the index finger he will be hancirious and also commit wheltery; and of the thumb enjoyers of many women and that his words will
If such a line stops in the middle of the palm he will have wealth and progeny.

If after stopping in the middle of the palm, benethes off into three lines each reaching the base of the middle finger, ring finger and little finger respectively, he will have twin treasures tangible wealth and pedne riches; and if it branches into two he will have vast riches or be a religious head, adept in all the arts.

If there is one line below the little finger at the edge of the pikes he will have one marriage; two lines two marriages; three up to five; beyond that these lines indicate only consultes and not married wives.
Similar lines below the thumb indicate sons, yeogey.
If the line starting below the little finger reaches the base of the index finger (or the thumb according to one authority) be will live for hundred years and will also have wealth.
If it reaches the base of the middle finger he will live for eighty years; the ring finger-fifty years; if it does not go beyond the little finger his life will be only twenty years.
If the lower part of the thumb has the line like a chain he will not be married up to his fortieth year, but will have two wives after that and six children.
If the middle finger is not on the level but lower he will not have any patrimony.

If the little finger is of the length of the ring finger he will live for hundred years, if it reaches above the third joint of the ring finger, his life will be ninety-nine years; if it reaches the third joint, eighty-nine years, if it is below the third and above the second, seventy-seven years; if it reaches the second joint sixty-five years.
Ring finger-In the first joint if there is a single line, he will have many ornaments and if many lines, scholarship.
Little finger-A single line in the first joint indicates that he will be deceitful; more than one, he will have passions couched (makeovers) (or a humorous tract, wife's years as a variant reading).

Fingers on the left hand-On the thumb he will have (or commit) sins; on the index finger, sluggish mentality or small in intelligence; on the middle finger short life; on the ring finger poverty and on the little finger sterility.

If it comes to the middle of the middle finger, he will be a ruler of the world; to the third joint of the same a manster endowed with wisdom; the middle of the finger, will have goodness and prosperity; the base of the same, a wight roaming about; and if to the middle of the palm destitution and complete poverty.
The lengths of life may also be ascertained by another way which is as follows: The length measured from the right shoulder to the tip of the middle finger of the right hand is to be doubled.
But if there is a break like a cross in the line, then she will have lifelong poverty.

Thumb - A single line in the top joint indicates that she will have mere enjoyment, while many lines there indicate that she will be strong in sexual enjoyment, but will have distress.
A clock-wise whorl on the top joint of the thumb indicates that she will have wealth, while a counter-clockwise one, long life; and a fold adulter.
[Details for the little finger are not available in the extant manuscripts.] Next.
A trident line on the forehead indicates that she will live like the Goddess of Prosperity with thousand women serving her.
